target_en: Maybe I drank too much. I was lying on the tatami floor.
Kasai asked me if I could get in the car,
so I told him I'd barf if I got in now.
I felt the eerieness of the ritual storehouse coming back to me... despite drinking it away with alcohol earlier.
But since I was too drunk to get ready for bed, I still had it on me.
\"But even if she decides by herself,
the hag uses you to take care of various things, doesn't she?
And you're telling me you don't know anything?\"
